calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phyllis Berenson for John Salvador.

Ms. Berenson presented an endorsed copy of a declaration that was filed today, stated that her Client or the family did not know that they needed to get an attorney and open probate until the property was reduced to cash, and that the property was in the trust the whole time. Ms. Berenson also stated that she believes by law the decedent had a vested interest in the property but it would be a net interest, that there were three owners and that there are lots of expenses. The petition for final distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Continued To Jan-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Granted Per Written Order
